description_long: This bird features a streamlined body with a predominantly dark green to black plumage, accented by a sharp contrast of white on its upper body and head. The wings are sleek and appear to be closely held to the body, giving it an aerodynamic profile. The beak is short and conical, suitable for pecking or seed-eating, and is positioned at the front of the head. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall stance suggests a perching or ground-dwelling bird. The tail is straight-edged and appears squared off, blending smoothly with the body. The surface of the bird is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way that highlights its clean, modern lines.
description: A sleek bird with dark green-black plumage, a white head and upper body, and a short conical beak. Its body is smooth and glossy, with a squared tail and streamlined wings.
description_view_0: A mostly dark green-black surface with subtle feather-like texturing, showing the bird's back or side.
description_view_1: A sharp corner view highlighting the white upper body and head, with a clear division between white and dark plumage.
description_view_2: A diagonal perspective emphasizing the dark underside and the transition between the white and dark areas.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the bird's side, showing a central seam and the smooth, dark surface.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark body with a sharply contrasting white head and upper body
